transcript.text: Hello I wanted to make a quick video about my supplements that I use because I stopped taking
Them for a while because I kind of felt bad about spending so much money on them because they're
Expensive and I kind of got in the habit of a few days you know of getting and have like buying
Eating bags of candy and stuff and then I don't have energy the next day and I can't really work
Out and today I took this something that's like all of them for the first time and I remember how
I felt when I was taking them all before and I just have like unlimited energy I feel like a
Machine so the stuff that I like to take that kind of totally wakes me up is like the stuff now
Extreme I had the stuff called black powder before and I had too much caffeine and totally bonked me
But other stuff recovery definitely I can feel how I can recover like if I take that in conjunction
With glutamine then um I can totally recover and I can be ready to go the next day I have had
Experiences where I can't work out for like two days just because I have like one really good
Workout day and it's like I felt like something was wrong and that was actually a time when I
Wasn't taking these supplements you know so and I haven't actually experienced wondering why I'm not
Uh recovering as fast when I'm not taking a supplement so I think it's amazing these things
Really do work totally crazy and creatine I take too creatine um doesn't feel amazing
In this soy protein powder I take uh six scoops a day two scoops per serving three times a day which
Is 160 grams of protein a day um this stuff is pumping me up from like 163 to like 190 I'm now right now
And I was only like 185 186 7 just a couple weeks ago so I'm just pulling up on the weight I'm thinking
Maybe it's possible for me to get to 200 so maybe you have a little bit of a belly but uh I don't
Think that has to do with like enough protein powder um so yeah definitely this stuff makes a huge
Huge difference it's totally worth it
